hero.title: What does AI say about your business?
hero.subtitle: 500+ million people already ask ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity instead of Google. If AI doesn't recommend your business - you're losing clients right now
hero.definition: Merkaba Digital is a Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) agency that optimizes businesses for visibility in AI systems

faq.q: What is GEO?
faq.a: Generative Engine Optimization is the optimization of a business for visibility in AI systems: ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude. When a user asks AI about a product or service, GEO ensures your brand is in the answer. It is the next evolution after SEO

faq.q: How is GEO different from SEO?
faq.a: SEO optimizes a website for positions in Google. GEO optimizes a brand for citation in AI answers. SEO brings clicks, GEO brings recommendations. In 2026 you need both, but GEO is becoming critically important as AI search grows

faq.q: Why is my business not visible in ChatGPT?
faq.a: AI systems form answers based on structured data, source authority and semantic connections. Even with good Google positions, your content may be invisible to AI if it's not optimized for the format that AI can cite

faq.q: How much does GEO optimization cost?
faq.a: Merkaba Digital offers three programs: LAUNCH ($5,000 one-time audit), GROWTH (from $8,500/mo) and DOMINANCE (from $15,000/mo). Each includes AI audit, strategy and monitoring. A free initial audit lets you assess the current situation

faq.q: How long until results?
faq.a: First AI visibility improvements appear 4-8 weeks after optimization begins. Sustainable growth requires 3-6 months of systematic work. Some tactics (e.g., Schema.org markup) show effect within 2-3 weeks

faq.q: Which AI systems do you track?
faq.a: We monitor five main AI platforms: ChatGPT (OpenAI), Gemini (Google), Perplexity, Claude (Anthropic) and Copilot (Microsoft). Each has its own citation algorithms, and the optimization strategy accounts for the specifics of each

faq.q: Do you work with companies outside Turkey?
faq.a: Yes. GEO is not tied to geography - AI systems are global. We work with businesses from any country in four languages: English, Russian, Turkish and Arabic

faq.q: Do I need to change my current website?
faq.a: Not necessarily completely. We add structured data, optimize content structure and create new AI-optimized pages. In most cases, the existing site is adapted without a redesign

services.packages_cta: Not sure which package? Start with a free AI audit
services.definition: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the optimization of content and digital brand presence for citation in AI platform answers

faq.q: What is included in the AI Visibility Audit?
faq.a: A complete analysis of brand visibility across 5 AI systems with 100+ queries in multiple languages. You receive: current AI Visibility Score, competitor map, list of cited sources in your niche, and a prioritized action plan

faq.q: What is AI Visibility Score?
faq.a: The percentage of queries in which an AI system mentions your brand. If out of 100 relevant queries ChatGPT mentions you in 15, your score is 15%. The market average is 20-25%, niche leaders reach 60-70%

faq.q: Why do I need Entity Building?
faq.a: AI systems determine authority through "entities" - connected data about your brand in Knowledge Graph, Schema.org, Wikipedia, industry directories. The stronger your entity profile, the more often AI cites you

faq.q: What does Content Engineering include?
faq.a: Optimization of existing content and creation of new content in formats that AI prefers to cite: FAQ pages, expert guides, comparison tables, term definitions. We also structure content with Schema.org markup

faq.q: How does the AI Visibility Dashboard work?
faq.a: A personal web dashboard with real-time data. Shows: AI Visibility Score per platform, mention dynamics, competitor comparison, cited sources, recommendations. Available 24/7 via a secure link

faq.q: Can I start with just the audit?
faq.a: Yes. The LAUNCH package ($5,000) is a one-time audit with a detailed report and action plan. You get a full picture of current AI visibility and can decide whether to continue with us or implement the recommendations yourself

faq.q: What if competitors already have GEO?
faq.a: Less than 12% of companies have a documented GEO strategy. The probability that your competitors are already systematically optimized for AI is low. But this window of opportunity is closing: the sooner you start, the stronger your advantage

faq.q: Do you support multilingual GEO?
faq.a: Yes. We conduct audits and optimization in four languages: EN, RU, TR, AR. AI systems give different answers in different languages, so a multilingual strategy is critically important for international businesses

cases.case_title: Construction company, Mediterranean coast of Turkey
cases.case_subtitle: How a developer with 30 years of history became visible to AI in 4 months
cases.case_problem: A company with an impeccable reputation and 20+ completed projects virtually did not exist in the AI space. Potential property buyers from Russia, Europe and the Gulf countries asked ChatGPT and Gemini about the best developers in the region - and received recommendations for competitors. Meanwhile, the company's website held strong positions in Google.

case_steps.title: AI Visibility Audit
items: Checked 35 queries in 3 languages (EN, RU, TR) across 4 AI systems
Found: the brand was mentioned in only 5% of queries

case_steps.title: Entity Authority Building
items: Implemented Schema.org RealEstateListing for all projects
Strengthened presence on platforms that AI cites

case_steps.title: Content Engineering
items: Created an expert content hub in 3 languages
Launched FAQ sections structured for AI citation
Published a series of guides for foreign buyers

cases.case_quote: We didn't understand why, with strong Google positions, potential clients using ChatGPT were going to competitors. Merkaba Digital didn't just show us the problem - they solved it systematically. In 4 months, our brand became the first thing AI recommends in our region

process_steps.title: Audit
process_steps.desc: Full analysis of your brand's AI visibility, competitors and key queries. You receive a detailed report on the current state of affairs.

process_steps.title: Strategy
process_steps.desc: Based on the audit, we develop an action plan: what to optimize, what content to create, which platforms to strengthen. We agree on priorities with you.

process_steps.title: Implementation
process_steps.desc: Structured Data, content optimization, entity building, dashboard launch. First results appear at week 6-8.

process_steps.title: Growth & Scaling
process_steps.desc: Monitoring, strategy adjustment, content scaling. AI visibility grows exponentially with the right foundation.

faq.q: How quickly do first GEO results appear?
faq.a: First changes in AI answers are visible 2-4 weeks after implementing Schema.org and content optimization. Sustainable AI Visibility Score growth begins at week 6-8. A full optimization cycle takes 4-6 months

faq.q: What ROI does GEO deliver?
faq.a: According to industry data, agencies implementing GEO show 3-5x ROI. One B2B SaaS client increased citations by 22-47% over 6 months. Specific results depend on niche, competition and scope of work

faq.q: Can I see the dashboard live?
faq.a: Yes. We provide access to a demo dashboard with real data from a construction company. This allows you to see the reporting format and visualization before starting collaboration

faq.q: Do you guarantee results?
faq.a: We don't promise specific numbers because AI algorithms are opaque and constantly updated. But we guarantee a systematic approach, transparent reporting and data-driven strategy adjustment. 100% of our clients see AI visibility growth

about.hero_title: Not an agency. AI visibility engineers
about.hero_subtitle: We understand how AI systems work from the inside, and use this knowledge for your business
about.definition: Merkaba Digital is a team of digital strategists and AI engineers with 15+ years of experience, specializing in Generative Engine Optimization
story_text: Merkaba Digital was born at the intersection of two worlds: 15 years of experience in digital strategy and a deep understanding of how AI systems work.

When the search landscape began to change radically in 2024-2025, we saw a gap: companies were spending millions on SEO but remained invisible to AI. ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity - all these systems formed their recommendations by different rules than Google. And almost no one understood exactly which ones.

We did. Not from marketing reports, but from real engineering work with LLMs, structured data and AI architecture. That's how Merkaba Digital was born - an agency that doesn't just optimize content, but engineers visibility at the data level.
philosophy_text: Our name is not random. Merkaba in sacred geometry is the Flower of Life, a structure from which all forms of the Universe unfold. Two counter-flowing streams of energy, creating balance and harmony.

We see the same structure in the world of AI. Behind every ChatGPT response lies invisible geometry: knowledge graphs, source authority, semantic connections. Most businesses see only the surface - the text of the response. We see the architecture that formed it.
By combining analytical thinking with intuitive understanding of systems, we create strategies that work not against AI, but in harmony with it.

advantages.title: Engineering approach to AI
advantages.desc: We don't guess how LLMs work. We work with APIs, structured data and citation algorithms at an engineering level. Our strategies are based on mechanics, not guesswork.

advantages.title: 15+ years in digital strategy
advantages.desc: From first SEO campaigns to managing development and launching AI automations. We've been through every search evolution and know where the market is heading. This is not our first "era transition" - but perhaps the most significant one.

advantages.title: Proprietary tools
advantages.desc: Our own AI visibility monitoring platform, built on a production-grade AI stack. Automation that no traditional agency offers. Your personal dashboard with real-time data.

advantages.title: Measurable results
advantages.desc: Every action is tied to specific KPIs. No vanity metrics. AI Visibility Score, mention count, position in responses, sentiment - everything is transparent, everything is in the dashboard, everything is under your control.

numbers.label: years in digital marketing and strategy

approach_items.title: Data-driven, not opinion-driven
approach_items.desc: We start with data, not assumptions. Every audit is hundreds of checks on real queries in real AI systems. Decisions are made based on what works, not what "should work".

approach_items.title: Transparency, not a black box
approach_items.desc: You see everything: every query, every AI response, every change in visibility. Your dashboard is not a pretty picture for a report, it's a working tool reflecting reality.

approach_items.title: Long-term value, not quick hacks
approach_items.desc: We build fundamental AI visibility that grows over time. No gray schemes, no manipulation - systematic work with authority, content and data.

about.industries_note: GEO strategy adapts to the specifics of each industry - from the set of queries to the presence platforms

faq.q: Who is behind Merkaba Digital?
faq.a: A team with 15+ years of experience in digital marketing, SEO and AI technologies. We combine strategic thinking with engineering understanding of how LLM models, structured data and citation algorithms work

faq.q: Why the name Merkaba?
faq.a: Merkaba is a symbol of sacred geometry, the Flower of Life, containing the fundamental structures of all existence. We see a parallel with AI: behind visible answers lies an invisible architecture of data. Our task is to manage this architecture

faq.q: What industries do you work with?
faq.a: GEO strategy adapts to any industry. We work with real estate, healthcare, finance, e-commerce, tourism, SaaS, professional services and education. The set of queries and presence platforms differ, but the methodology is universal
